subject: Human Resources
title: Employee Listening Strategies
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Employee Listening Strategies.

hook.text: A company runs an annual engagement survey.

buildup.text: Employee listening goes beyond annual surveys—pulse checks, sentiment analysis, feedback platforms, and stay interviews.

discovery.text: Continuous listening identifies issues early—before they become attrition.

twist.text: Asking and not acting is worse than not asking at all. Survey fatigue hits when employees share feedback and nothing changes.

climax.text: Close the loop: share what you heard, explain what you'll do, and follow through. Action is the price of asking.

punchline.text: Listening without acting is just surveillance with extra steps.

quiz.question: What causes survey fatigue in organizations?
options: When employees share feedback and nothing changes
